mandatedPacks.rationale: DOH and PhilHealth regulatory compliance is a legal requirement for all healthcare facilities operating in the Philippines. The Universal Health Care Act (RA 11223) and Data Privacy Act (RA 10173) establish mandatory compliance frameworks.
ICD-10-CM diagnosis coding and RVS procedure coding are mandated by DOH for all PhilHealth claims. Facilities cannot submit valid claims without these coding systems.

defaultOnPacks.rationale: English is the baseline product language and the primary professional language used in Philippine healthcare facilities.
deactivationConstraints: Baseline product language cannot be deactivated.

defaultOnPacks.rationale: PH locale conventions (date format, currency PHP, number formatting) are expected defaults for all Philippine tenants.
deactivationConstraints: Locale pack is required for correct date, currency, and number display.

defaultOnPacks.rationale: PhilHealth is the universal national health insurance program. Nearly all Philippine facilities process PhilHealth claims. Enabled by default; facilities with exclusively private-pay patients may disable.

eligibilityConditions: Requires a distro ADR (VE-DISTRO-ADR-NNNN) adding Filipino as a bounded product language per VE-DISTRO-ADR-0003.
Currently only English, Korean, and Spanish are bounded product languages.
This pack does not yet exist.

excludedPacks.exclusionRationale: HIPAA is a US-only regulatory framework. It does not apply to the Philippine legal market and cannot be composed alongside PH regulatory packs.

language.scopeBounds: English baseline only. Filipino not yet a bounded product language.
language.notes: English pack (lang-en) exists as a draft manifest. No implemented translations yet.

regulatory.scopeBounds: UHC Act + Data Privacy Act + PhilHealth eClaims identified. No compliance logic implemented.
regulatory.notes: Regulatory pack (regulatory-philhealth-doh) exists as a draft manifest. Compliance frameworks listed but not yet validated against DOH requirements.

payer.scopeBounds: PhilHealth only. Private HMO payers not yet addressed.
payer.notes: Payer pack (payer-philhealth) exists as a draft manifest. Archive repo has a prototype PhilHealth connector (Phase 38/40) as reference material.

nationalStandards.scopeBounds: ICD-10-CM and RVS identified. No coding tables or mappings implemented.
nationalStandards.notes: Standards pack (standards-ph) exists as a draft manifest. Coding system integration is a future implementation concern.

locale.scopeBounds: en-PH locale only. Date, currency (PHP), and number formatting identified.
locale.notes: Locale pack (locale-ph) exists as a draft manifest. No implemented locale configuration yet.

clinicalContent.scopeBounds: No PH-specific clinical content identified yet.
clinicalContent.notes: Clinical content packs for PH are a future concern. VistA clinical data model is market-neutral at baseline.

infrastructure.scopeBounds: No PH-specific infrastructure requirements identified beyond PhilHealth eClaims API connectivity.
infrastructure.notes: PhilHealth eClaims adapter is an external-system adapter with integration-pending fallback.

operational.scopeBounds: No operational runbooks, training materials, or support documentation for PH market.
operational.notes: Operational readiness is a future concern gated by implementation progress in other dimensions.
